SEARCH
Package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project

Class Level

java.lang.Object
io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Level
public class Level extends Object
Represents a singular Level in the game, managing the ghostTurns in the level

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Level(int levelNumber, int difficulty, Main game)
    Constructs a level using the parameters given and sets the background field based on the level number

  • Constructor Details

    • Level

      public Level(int levelNumber, int difficulty, Main game)
      Constructs a level using the parameters given and sets the background field based on the level number
      Parameters:
      levelNumber - the level number
      difficulty - the difficulty of the level
      game - the Main class

  • Method Details

    • startLevel

      public void startLevel()
      initializes the spawning positions of all the ghosts in all the turns of this Level

    • addTurn

      public void addTurn(Ghostturn turn)
      Adds a GhostTurn to the level
      Parameters:
      turn - the ghostturn to add

    • getCurrentTurn

      public Ghostturn getCurrentTurn()

    • shapeDrawn

      public void shapeDrawn(int shapeIndex, Cat c)
      Calls the ghostTurn shapeDrawn based on the index of the shape and plays the shapes' respective noise. Also increments turn if the current turn is completed, and sets completed to true if the level is completed.
      Parameters:
      shapeIndex - the index of the shape to be removed from the ghosts
      c - the cat class value (used for lives)

    • update

      public void update(float delta, Cat c)
      First checks if the turn is completed, and returns if so. Then it changes the position of ghostx and ghosty for each ghost based on the speed (determined by delta time and difficulty) and location. Checks whether the ghost is alive based on if it is too close to the cat and removes the ghost if it is not alive. Also checks if the current turn is completed or if the level is completed and takes the appropriate actions based on that
      Parameters:
      delta - the change in time between the last frame and this frame
      c - the cat object (that manages lives)

    • nextTurn

      public void nextTurn()
      changes the current turn index to the next one

    • currentTurnFinished

      public boolean currentTurnFinished()
      checks if the current turn is done
      Returns:
      a boolean that checks if the current turn is done

    • isCompleted

      public boolean isCompleted()
      checks if the level is completed
      Returns:
      a boolean that checks if the level is completed

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver(Cat c)
      checks if you lost
      Returns:
      a boolean that checks if you are not alive

    • getLevelNumber

      public int getLevelNumber()
      Retrieves the current level number
      Returns:
      the current level number

    • getDifficulty

      public int getDifficulty()
      Retrieves the difficulty
      Returns:
      the difficulty of the level

    • getBackground

      public com.badlogic.gdx.graphics.Texture getBackground()
      Retrieves the background
      Returns:
      the level's background

    • ghostPos

      public void ghostPos(int turnInd)
      Initializes spawning positions for the specified ghostTurn
      Parameters:
      turnInd - the ghostTurn# you are initializing the positions of
